content: When writing design lock documents with one-way-door decisions, require at least two independent review rounds before sign-off
Never rename established ERP terminology (Engineering, Production, Quality) without explicit user request — industry-standard names prevent churn
NATS subjects in this platform are plain event_type strings like inventory.item_issued — never use hierarchical module.events.event_type patterns
WIP exists only as a GL account balance — Inventory has no WIP state, items are tracked as issued or received only
When a rename or refactor is immediately reverted, treat the pair as a single no-op — avoid creating separate beads for rename+revert
Always validate NATS subject patterns against actual codebase subscriber filters before documenting them in design locks
Design lock documents should explicitly distinguish event_type field values from NATS subject strings to prevent consumer confusion
